title: Command Statistics
description:
Adds /statistics [add | query | set | store | reduce |project ] to allow OPs and datapacks to manipulate players' statistics.

Development for all my projects will be paused for the duration of the BDS boycott against microsoft.
body:
I wanted a datapack that would craft suspicious stew for me if I had all the ingredients.
I wanted that datapack to increment my crafting stats when it did.
I was told that was impossible.

So, I put too much effort into making made a mod that adds this functionality.

Command Statistics lets you use commands to manipulate a player's statistics. Currently, you can query, add, set, and reduce stats, as well as record a stat's to a scoreboard objective.

And so, my suspicious stew autocrafting datapack now adds 1 to my statistics everytime it makes stew for me.
